text.title: Google Display Network Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion Q2 awareness campaign, $2k/mo. Three-tier audience (in-market SaaS + affinity Tech + remarketing site-visitors-30d). Standard exclusions on.
example.note: Three audiences, exclusions on, four creative formats, capped frequency, dual KPI.
